misc: If not on the course, he is probably billing clients
biography: Lassi, a formidable competitor from Lakeside Golf Vammala, brings a unique blend of skill and intellect to the greens. Known for his meticulous approach and unwavering focus, Lassi has graced the Hector Trophée with his presence on nine previous occasions. While the coveted Hector Trophée title has eluded him thus far, he has demonstrated his individual prowess by capturing the Victor Trophy once.

Beyond the golf course, Lassi is a practicing lawyer, demonstrating the same strategic thinking and precision in the courtroom as he does on the fairway. Indeed, rumour has it that when Lassi is not on the course, he is probably billing clients, ever the diligent professional.
